# tfe_project_settings

Additional Project settings, which may override organization defaults

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `project_id` (String)

### Optional

- `default_agent_pool_id` (String)
- `default_execution_mode` (String)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Service-generated identifier for the resource
- `overwrites` (Attributes) Describes which settings are being overwritten from the organization defaults (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--overwrites))

<a id="nestedatt--overwrites"></a>
### Nested Schema for `overwrites`

Read-Only:

- `default_agent_pool_id` (Boolean) Whether the default_agent_pool_id is being overwritten from the organization default
- `default_execution_mode` (Boolean) Whether the default_execution_mode is being overwritten from the organization default
